title: Somewhat Sophisticated Vinyl Decor
description: Aims to improve the music disc collecting experience such as adding Disc racks and more.
body:
# ![Somewhat Sophisticated Vinyl Decor](https://github.com/AzulConspirator/OngakuMod/blob/main/img/proj_title.png?raw=true)
Music Disc collection mod focused on making discs worth displaying again. Instead of keeping rare discs locked away in chests or leaving them in item frames collecting dust, **SSV Decor** lets you display your collection whilst still being able to listen to it. - Display them as vinyl records or album covers - Play them directly from your collection - Keep your favourite discs visible while still using them | Made for NeoForge 1.21.1 | -- ## Features
Disc Displays - Store and display your music disc collection - Displayed discs are dynamically color-sampled from their textures - should work with modded music discs (item texture depended) - supports custom Per Displayed Disc textures via resource pack (check template [here](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/ssv-decor-custom))
| Includes Disc Racks, Disc Boxes, and Wall Mounts. [ Table not Included ] | -- ![Disc Display Image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/xVfyaI9r/images/b0e62f0aecab612cca3f72274e0e6500d6a0cab0.png) | Also Comes with Optional Resource pack, Custom Displays for Vanilla Discs | --
Sound Box A jukebox controller/Hub for your displayed disc collection. it physically moves the disc from your collection into the jukebox. Connect it to your Disc Displays: - Browse your stored discs - Play discs through a nearby vanilla jukebox - Automatically return discs after playback - Support autoplay playlists - Skip or exclude tracks from autoplay
![Sound Box Image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/xVfyaI9r/images/9f0c9404743a205e2abbcd60aed8732876525588.png)
Speaker Extend your Sound Box playback area. Speakers connect to a Sound Box and allow music to be heard further away.
![Speaker Image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/xVfyaI9r/images/bd4eb570280c4dd1c4e53fa81358cd78d183d2ac.png)
Audio Relay remote connection to your Collection. Links to a Sound Box, to have access to to soundbox on-the-go. - have access to a limited version of sound box UI - able used as Item and Block (Shift Right-Click to Place)
![Relay Image](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/xVfyaI9r/images/26405773315548e6f145db65dc908894ecc3c99f.png) ## Usage 1. Place a Sound Box next to a jukebox to get started. 2. Crouch + Right-Click with a **Tuning Fork**, On a Sound Box to get its ID. 3. then Right-Click any Disc Display to link to that Soundbox. - Content of Connected displays will appear in the Sound Box interface. - The same linking process works with Speakers. - Audio Relay Connects by Right-click on a Sound Box - Sound Box works by moving discs between connected display storage and the adjacent jukebox. - Disc Displays can also be used as decoration on their own, without a Sound Box. --- ## Technical Notes
- Music Disc detection is based on the **JUKEBOX_PLAYABLE** item component - Disc/Cover Display Model uses [TintIndex](https://minecraft.wiki/w/Model), same as Leather Armor, samples set various pixels in the Disc item texture (Higher-resolution textures should work, but this has not been tested) - After playback: 1. Discs are returned to their original slot whenever possible 2. If the original slot is unavailable, another empty slot is used 3. If no storage space is available, the disc is ejected from the jukebox as an item - Multiplayer/server stability is still being tested, especially for networking-related features - I didnt add any range limitations on Linking, theoretically it should work from any loaded chunk but suggest keep it within 64 blocks.
## Planned - [ added since 1.1.0, check resource pack template [here](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/ssv-decor-custom) ] ~~Disc Color System turn into fallback, support texture per displayed disc/cover~~ - [ added since 1.3.1, Implemented Audio Relay Item ] ~~portable solution~~ - more speaker variants - Support Newer MC Versions (I will Once Cobblemon & Create moved to those versions as well) ## Compatibility
Etched - able to store disc in storage - able to play from SoundBox and Audio Relay - dedicated support for custom Display textures (check template [here](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/ssv-decor-custom) ) - only plays the 1st Track in Etched Disc - Disc are assumed to be 5 minutes duration, used for Autoplay, it cant be pulled dynamically. ```txt to keep inline with this mod core design focus,so no album support, as the whole point is to showcase the disc and play them individually (like vanilla). Etched already has a solution for album natively anyways. ```
More Discs - are supported as Vanilla Disc, All Features work natively.
## Credit - Made it Solo Babyyy!! [![ko-fi](https://ko-fi.com/img/githubbutton_sm.svg)](https://ko-fi.com/X8D31ZVM7D) - Inspired by [Sophisticated Storage by P3pp3rF1y](https://modrinth.com/mod/sophisticated-storage). This mod is not affiliated with that mod or its creator. ## License this mod is under **CC-BY 4.0.** feel free to include in modpacks, videos, etc. Just link back to this page if possible For any general queries, DM me on Discord (prof_bones). | also if it seems to be silent more than a year with no updates to the most recent standard version of Modded MC (I use cobblemon & Create as a good measure), consider this abandoned by me then feel free to take over, contact me first tho. | --- ⚠ This mod ONLY exists on Modrinth as of 2026. Any sites hosting this mod outside of Modrinth are not official releases. ⚠
